dimensions.name: What it does
dimensions.a: Splits one task into independent subtasks, runs them in parallel
dimensions.b: Runs the same task multiple times, aggregates diverse outputs

dimensions.name: Why use it
dimensions.a: Speed — subtasks don't depend on each other

dimensions.name: Example
dimensions.a: Review code for security, style, and correctness simultaneously with three specialized LLM calls
dimensions.b: Run content moderation 5 times, flag if any run detects a violation

dimensions.name: Aggregation
dimensions.a: Merge results (e.g., combine all findings into one report)
